related_attempts.reason: The local supervisor ran the materializer twice and emitted the outer marker before executing the generated audit ticket or writing reports.
Bridge accepted and source facts were correct, but the audit report omitted verification.all_decisions_consistent_with_gate.

The first document-audit verifier command was present, but the deterministic decision policy treated quote-limit-failed and generic supervisor-audit language too loosely; the corrected verifier rejects v2.

learned_changes: A 14-artifact mixed-schema audit is too large for the current single audit node; the supervisor can stop after materialization unless the graph ticket forbids materializer-only completion.
Five-artifact split batches are currently a better unit for this local supervisor graph pattern.
Generic authority validation is necessary but not sufficient for document-artifact audit reports.
A document-specific verifier is required to catch missing aggregate decision fields and wrong gate-to-decision mappings.
Quote-limit-failed gates must be handled before generic failed gates.
Generic wording such as before supervisor audit does not prove paid_supervisor_audit_required; only explicit ready-for-supervisor-audit or paid-supervisor-audit evidence should do that.
interpretation: This run supports split-node graph orchestration over one large mixed audit node. The free local supervisor can complete a five-artifact mixed-schema graph job when deterministic source facts and a document-specific verifier are in the loop.
